claim: Agent harnesses solve context management by wrapping coding agents with persistence, progress tracking, and multi-session orchestration, allowing complex projects to be completed across separate agent invocations
actionable: Implement an agent harness when building complex AI coding systems to handle context management across multiple sessions, include progress tracking files and state persistence between runs
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents

claim: Subagents in a harness handle specific services (Linear, GitHub, Slack) separately to avoid bloating the main orchestrator's context while maintaining coordinated workflows
actionable: When building multi-service agent systems, create subagents for each external service (project tracking, version control, communication) to isolate context and enable parallel operations
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents

claim: Arcade is an MCP gateway platform that simplifies agent authorization for services like Linear, GitHub, and Slack without exposing credentials directly to the agent
actionable: Use Arcade's MCP gateway to connect agents to Linear, GitHub, and Slack while maintaining secure authentication and avoiding credential management burden
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents

claim: Tool discovery in MCP combined with Cloud Code avoids dumping 91 tool definitions into the model context at once, improving efficiency through selective tool loading
actionable: Use MCP's tool discovery feature with Claude Code to load only necessary tools dynamically rather than exposing all tools upfront
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents

claim: An appspec is a PRD-style document that defines all features to be built autonomously by a harness in a specific JSON format for task dependencies and prioritization
actionable: Create an appspec document in the recommended JSON format when setting up an agent harness, detailing all features, dependencies, and success criteria
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents

claim: Agent harnesses should use Linear as the source of truth for project state rather than local files, with metadata files only pointing to the correct Linear project ID
actionable: For multi-session agent harnesses, configure Linear as the central state repository and use minimal local files only for project ID references
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents

claim: Regression testing after each feature implementation in an agent harness is critical because previous agent sessions frequently break work from earlier sessions
actionable: Include automated regression testing in your harness workflow to catch regressions introduced by new feature implementations
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents

claim: Each agent in a harness team should have its own territory (assigned files and deliverables) to avoid overwriting and conflicts during parallel work
actionable: When designing multi-agent systems, explicitly assign file ownership and deliverable responsibilities to each agent to prevent write conflicts
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents

claim: Playwright MCP server can validate generated code by running it through browser automation during agent development, ensuring functional correctness
actionable: Integrate Playwright MCP for validation testing in your agent harness to automatically verify that generated code runs correctly
source_title: Turn Claude Code into Your Full Engineering Team with Subagents
